title: Tall Wheat
description: Tall wheat with colors that are consistent with its item texture.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

Wheat at its final stage is now 1.5 blocks tall, and uses the color pallet from its item texture, giving it a drier apperance. The default color pallet for the final stage of wheat is still used, just now used on the second to last growth stage.
